title: GTB proposes N2.50 Kobo final dividend For Full Year 2019
description: The Directors of Guaranty Trust Bank Plc recommend the payment of a final dividend of N2.50k (Two Naira, Fifty Kobo Only) per ordinary share of 50 Kobo bringing the total dividend for the fi
html:
The Directors of Guaranty Trust Bank Plc recommend the payment of a final dividend of N2.50k (Two Naira, Fifty Kobo Only) per ordinary share of 50 Kobo bringing the total dividend for the financial year ended December 31, 2019 to N2.80k (2018: N2.75k per share).

Withholding tax would be deducted at the point of payment.
